status: GREEN-RECAPTURED (QA-004 fix round 1) 2026-07-21: widened to the codex-F8 universe — EVERY non-framework assembly selected through the route .deps.json package runtime assets, each file SHA-256 hash-compared. Machine-readable universe_predicate consumed by both harness and test.

dafny_pipeline_consumption.kind: embedded resource consumed on the verification path (not a bare Assembly.Load — the resource content feeds parse/resolve/verify)
dafny_pipeline_consumption.trigger: --standard-libraries=true while verifying fixtures/stdlib-anchor.dfy (variance from the Option Manifest recorded explicitly in evidence)
source_citations: dafny v4.11.0 Source/DafnyCore/Pipeline/Compilation.cs:181-203 (Compilation adds the stdlib doo URIs to the verified file set)
dafny v4.11.0 Source/DafnyCore/DafnyFile.cs:214-222 (HandleDooFile: Assembly.Load(uri.Host) + GetManifestResourceStream; throws if the resource is absent)
dafny_pipeline_consumption.removal_differential_test: same fixture with --standard-libraries=false fails at stage=resolution; with DafnyPipeline.dll removed/renamed in the route output, the --standard-libraries=true run fails with the typed missing-assembly/missing-resource error — proving the consumption matters (codex R2-11)

notes: Set equality, not subset (INV-002/RS-008): any loaded Dafny/Boogie-family assembly outside this mapping fails P03; an expected-but-never-loaded assembly is a failure, never a vacuous pass.
Route B observation (DD-001): neither DafnyDriver nor DafnyLanguageServer loads on this route — the hand-assembled Compilation graph is DafnyCore + DafnyPipeline + Boogie only.
DafnyPipeline.dll ships without an AssemblyInformationalVersion attribute; its identity is carried by the file digest (RS-008).

universe_predicate.note: QA-004 (codex F8): every non-framework assembly selected through the route harness .deps.json (library type=package with a runtime dll asset); project-built assemblies are excluded. Consumed by BOTH the harness (CaptureRuntimeIdentity/PackageRuntimeAssets) and the P03 test; narrowing it is a reviewable oracle diff.
